title: Squirrel Removal in Mount Pleasant, Westchester
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Mount Pleasant, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving Mount Pleasant homes. Call today!
intro: Mount Pleasant residents face unique squirrel challenges as these persistent rodents seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces throughout this scenic Westchester community. Our professional squirrel removal services protect homes from the damage and health risks associated with squirrel infestations. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive, humane squirrel removal solutions tailored to Mount Pleasant's residential neighborhoods and properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Mount Pleasant and Westchester County with fast, effective squirrel removal solutions. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods and provide permanent exclusion repairs with warranties, ensuring your Mount Pleasant home stays squirrel-free year-round.
localContext: Mount Pleasant's tree-lined streets and proximity to wooded areas near the Taconic State Parkway create ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive. The area's mix of historic homes, modern residences, and properties near Kensico Reservoir often feature architectural elements like dormers, eaves, and mature trees that provide easy squirrel access points requiring professional intervention.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Mount Pleasant?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Mount Pleasant typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and follow-up inspections to ensure complete removal.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Mount Pleasant attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the attic (especially morning and evening), visible droppings, chewed wires or wood, damaged insulation, and small entry holes around your roofline, soffits, or vents. You may also notice squirrels entering or exiting your roof during daylight hours.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane in Mount Pleasant?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Squirrels are safely trapped and relocated according to local ordinances. We never use poisons or inhumane methods, prioritizing the safety of both your family and the animals.

faqs.question: How do you prevent squirrels from returning to my Mount Pleasant home?
faqs.answer: After removal, we perform comprehensive exclusion work by sealing all entry points with heavy-duty materials like steel mesh and metal flashing. We also trim tree branches that provide roof access, install chimney caps, and secure vulnerable areas. Our work comes with a warranty to guarantee squirrels won't return.
